---
title: "Contact"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(icons)
```

<style type="text/css">
.title {
  display: none;
}

</style>

::: header
## **Zachary M. Moore**

Ontario, Canada

e-mail: [zacharymilosmoore\@gmail.com](mailto:zacharymilosmoore@gmail.com){.email}

[iNaturalist](https://inaturalist.ca/people/zacharymilosmoore) \| [eBird](https://ebird.org/profile/MTYwMzc5NQ/world)

```{r echo = F}
icon_style(fontawesome$brands$github,scale=5)
```

[GitHub](https://www.github.com/zacharymilosmoore)

```{r echo = F}
icon_style(fontawesome$brands$linkedin,scale=5,colour="blue")
```

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/zacharymilosmoore)

```{r echo = F}
icon_style(fontawesome$brands$researchgate,scale=5)
```

::: header
Last Updated:

```{r,results="asis", echo=F}

cat(format(Sys.time(),"%c"))
```

[GitHub Source](https://github.com/zacharymilosmoore/zacharymilosmoore.github.io)
:::
